channel.title: glazeruns TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from glazeruns

item.title: Critics are in the stands. You're in the arena. Go be cringe. Post anyway. You'll never know the impact you may have. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: Critics are in the stands. You're in the arena. Go be cringe. Post anyway. You'll never know the impact you may have. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: Hope to see you at the book signing. Thanks to @thelooprunning for hosting me on Saturday from 10am to noon at their Hyde Park location 108 West 43rd Austin, TX 78751 Podcasting with @scottykfitness and @_tristanworkman Spectating the @bpnsupps Last Man S
item.description: Hope to see you at the book signing. Thanks to @thelooprunning for hosting me on Saturday from 10am to noon at their Hyde Park location 108 West 43rd Austin, TX 78751 Podcasting with @scottykfitness and @_tristanworkman Spectating the @bpnsupps Last Man S

item.title: Anyone else get sad at the end of a race? smile, or you're doing it wrong #arizonamonster300 #runtok
item.description: Anyone else get sad at the end of a race? smile, or you're doing it wrong #arizonamonster300 #runtok

item.title: Strava hates multi-day events. The streak continues Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: Strava hates multi-day events. The streak continues Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: Start of the @bpnsupps G1M ultramarathon A lot of awesome runners Kinda wish I was doing it. My body doesn't wish it But my mind does Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #g1m
item.description: Start of the @bpnsupps G1M ultramarathon A lot of awesome runners Kinda wish I was doing it. My body doesn't wish it But my mind does Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #g1m

item.title: @Mike Egan inspires me at the @Bare Performance Nutrition G1M ultramarathon smile, or you're doing it wrong #g1m #runtok
item.description: @Mike Egan inspires me at the @Bare Performance Nutrition G1M ultramarathon smile, or you're doing it wrong #g1m #runtok

item.title: years of airport miles coming in clutch Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: years of airport miles coming in clutch Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: Never met a hater doing more than me Smile, or you're doing it wrong
item.description: Never met a hater doing more than me Smile, or you're doing it wrong

item.title: I'm planning book signings in major cities, New York, LA, Chicago, Boston, Seattle, places where I can reach the most people. But just because I'm focusing on big cities doesn't mean I can't make short stops in smaller places along the way. If you want me
item.description: I'm planning book signings in major cities, New York, LA, Chicago, Boston, Seattle, places where I can reach the most people. But just because I'm focusing on big cities doesn't mean I can't make short stops in smaller places along the way. If you want me

item.title: @markruns and @Kendall Picado Fallas are the last two Only one can win Every hour they have another loop to run Each loop is 4.2 miles The @Bare Performance Nutrition G1M ultramarathon has been fun to watch. Today will be epic Smile, or you're doing it
item.description: @markruns and @Kendall Picado Fallas are the last two Only one can win Every hour they have another loop to run Each loop is 4.2 miles The @Bare Performance Nutrition G1M ultramarathon has been fun to watch. Today will be epic Smile, or you're doing it

item.title: So fun to follow @markruns @Kendall Picado Fallas with the assist @Bare Performance Nutrition G1M was incredible Smile, or you're doing it wrong #g1m #runtok
item.description: So fun to follow @markruns @Kendall Picado Fallas with the assist @Bare Performance Nutrition G1M was incredible Smile, or you're doing it wrong #g1m #runtok

item.title: They're bringing it back for year 3. Join me for some amazing type 2 fun. And yes, the Mount Lemmon climb will put some serious hair on your chest. It definitely broke me a little bit. Smile, or you're doing it wrong. #runtok #ArizonaMonster300
item.description: They're bringing it back for year 3. Join me for some amazing type 2 fun. And yes, the Mount Lemmon climb will put some serious hair on your chest. It definitely broke me a little bit. Smile, or you're doing it wrong. #runtok #ArizonaMonster300

item.title: Trench foot and lost 10 pounds. Ready to go back for my 6th year in a row doing this insane race. Cocodona 250 is my favorite. Smile, or you're doing it wrong. #runtok #cocodona250
item.description: Trench foot and lost 10 pounds. Ready to go back for my 6th year in a row doing this insane race. Cocodona 250 is my favorite. Smile, or you're doing it wrong. #runtok #cocodona250

item.title: Days of running in rain and mud was hard on the feet Cocodona 250 2025 Smile, or you're doing it wrong #cocodona250 #runtok
item.description: Days of running in rain and mud was hard on the feet Cocodona 250 2025 Smile, or you're doing it wrong #cocodona250 #runtok

item.title: what do we call these? not jorts. smile,or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: what do we call these? not jorts. smile,or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: Movement is medicine. Let's not shame people for their pace. Smile, or you're doing it #runtok
item.description: Movement is medicine. Let's not shame people for their pace. Smile, or you're doing it #runtok

item.title: The joys of running. It be like that sometimes Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: The joys of running. It be like that sometimes Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: So happy for @ashkickn Congratulations Wish I could have been there to witness it. You might remember her shattering the 100 mile world record at Jackpot this year, where she lapped me more times than I can count. What a year it has been. Smile, or you'
item.description: So happy for @ashkickn Congratulations Wish I could have been there to witness it. You might remember her shattering the 100 mile world record at Jackpot this year, where she lapped me more times than I can count. What a year it has been. Smile, or you'

item.title: Breaking the stigma means dealing with people like this. Been doing this for years. Will keep doing it for years more. The critics are loud, but the people you help are louder. Don't let them silence you. Smile, or you're doing it wrong. #ptsd #mentalheal
item.description: Breaking the stigma means dealing with people like this. Been doing this for years. Will keep doing it for years more. The critics are loud, but the people you help are louder. Don't let them silence you. Smile, or you're doing it wrong. #ptsd #mentalheal

item.title: thanks for the fuel haters smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: thanks for the fuel haters smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: I promise I'll be okay Smile, or you're doing it wrong
item.description: I promise I'll be okay Smile, or you're doing it wrong

item.title: I wanted to eat that cookie #runtok
item.description: I wanted to eat that cookie #runtok

item.title: Canyons 50k this morning in Auburn, California Western States vibes Going to be in chill mode. Just making sure everything is working for Cocodona. And maybe grabbing a couple UTMB stones while I'm at it. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #canyonsb
item.description: Canyons 50k this morning in Auburn, California Western States vibes Going to be in chill mode. Just making sure everything is working for Cocodona. And maybe grabbing a couple UTMB stones while I'm at it. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #canyonsb

item.title: Canyons 50k this morning in Auburn, California Western States vibes Going to be in chill mode. Just making sure everything is working for Cocodona. And maybe grabbing a couple UTMB stones while I'm at it. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #canyons
item.description: Canyons 50k this morning in Auburn, California Western States vibes Going to be in chill mode. Just making sure everything is working for Cocodona. And maybe grabbing a couple UTMB stones while I'm at it. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #canyons

item.title: Actually got a bonus mile. End up being 32 miles! Free miles for the win. Canyons by UTMB 50k getting my UTMB stones #runtok #canyonsbyutmb
item.description: Actually got a bonus mile. End up being 32 miles! Free miles for the win. Canyons by UTMB 50k getting my UTMB stones #runtok #canyonsbyutmb

item.title: down to my last couple toenails. probably won't survive Cocodona 250 miler. Canyons by UTMB was a bit muddy. no issues. no kt tape for short distance. just @Salty Britches smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #canyonsbyutmb
item.description: down to my last couple toenails. probably won't survive Cocodona 250 miler. Canyons by UTMB was a bit muddy. no issues. no kt tape for short distance. just @Salty Britches smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #canyonsbyutmb

item.title: Run ultramarathons to train for ultramarathons. Canyons by UTMB 50k Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #canyonsbyutmb
item.description: Run ultramarathons to train for ultramarathons. Canyons by UTMB 50k Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #canyonsbyutmb

item.title: Run ultras to run ultras Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: Run ultras to run ultras Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: Now to run 100+ miles the week before Cocodona Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: Now to run 100+ miles the week before Cocodona Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: If you're going to be dumb, you better be tough. Cocodona 250 starts Monday There will be tracking and live coverage. It's going to be a party. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #cocodona250
item.description: If you're going to be dumb, you better be tough. Cocodona 250 starts Monday There will be tracking and live coverage. It's going to be a party. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok #cocodona250

item.title: Pulled off the win although I had to really work for it. 100 miles/161 km does not come easily. Especially when the race starts at 6pm. Born to Run 100 miler was an incredible experience and I will be back. #runtok #ultramarathon #ultrarunner #borntorun
item.description: Pulled off the win although I had to really work for it. 100 miles/161 km does not come easily. Especially when the race starts at 6pm. Born to Run 100 miler was an incredible experience and I will be back. #runtok #ultramarathon #ultrarunner #borntorun

item.description: No Description
